findings.description: `button:block` tag appears in the JSP code example in both the source and the knowledge file, but is absent from the s2 hints array. Users asking about the button block layout element would not be routed to this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP code: `<button:block>` wrapping `n:forInputPage` / `n:forConfirmationPage` elements. Knowledge file s2 JSP example also contains `<button:block>` but omits it from hints.
